seo.title: Yoga Studio Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your yoga studio. Route unhappy members to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Yoga Studios
hero.subheading: Students roll up their mats and rush to work. ReviewFlo helps you ask while class energy is still high.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Yoga Studio Faces

items.heading: Regulars love class but never think to review
One crowded class review blames the room temperature
items.body: Petty complaints read loud on a small business profile.

items.heading: Teachers rotate and messaging gets inconsistent
items.body: Some mention reviews at closing, most do not.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Yoga Studios

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Email or text after class packs
items.body: Reach people who already gave you their contact info.

items.heading: Private space for safety or injury concerns
Works for boutique studios
items.body: Priced for small teams, not big gym chains.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will members review a studio they already love?
items.a: Often, once you make it one tap and time it after a great class.
Send after someone finishes a trial they enjoyed, not mid-series.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same feedback routing without a contract built for franchises.
Add locations on higher tiers when you need separate dashboards.
No. Front desk or owners can send the link.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Yoga Studio Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
